title: How do I repay my debt to Back Market?
bodyHtml:
Context:
Your seller account may sometimes reach a critical financial situation when your wallet has a negative balance, and you owe Back Market an amount of money.
Most of the time, a negative balance is offset on the following invoices by your latest sales on the platform, but the amount of debt can also keep growing. In this case, an intervention is needed to clear the invoices and settle the financial situation of your account.

Process:
As soon as you cannot count on your sales to offset your debt, you need to repay your debt to Back Market following the process below.

  1. Check your latest invoice in your Back-office and the amount due to Back Market
  2. Send a bank transfer of this amount to the bank account attached below
  3. Specify “your PK number and the invoice number” as the reason for payment

 


Here are the Bank Details for each currency: 

EUR: 

Account Holder: JUNG SAS 

Address: 154 Boulevard Macdonald 75019 Paris France
